case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. SHUN L. YAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
